name.full: ServiceNow Incident & Change Management for Copilot Cowork

description.short: Manage ServiceNow incidents and change requests from Cowork
description.full: A Copilot Cowork plugin that connects to ServiceNow for IT service management. Create, query, update, and resolve incidents. Submit, approve, and track change requests. All through natural language in Cowork.

agentConnectors.description: Connects to ServiceNow for incident and change management via the Table API
